non_derivative_transactions.transaction_summary: The reporting owner acquired 7917.0 shares of Common Stock at $8.16 (Code M).

The reporting owner disposed 1281.0 shares of Common Stock at $63.3 (Code S). [Note 2: The "Amount" and "Price" reported in this Column 4 reflect the aggregate number and weighted-average price, respectively, of shares sold. These shares were sold in multiple transactions at prices ranging from $62.765 to $63.76, inclusive. footnotes.8: 25% of the shares subject to the Option vest on the one-year anniversary of January 16, 2018 (the "Option Vesting Commencement Date"), and thereafter 1/48th of the shares subject to the Option vest on each monthly anniversary of the Vesting Commencement Date.
footnotes.9: 1/48 of the shares subject to such option shall vest on the one-month anniversary of March 13, 2019 (the "Option Vesting Commencement Date") and 1/48th of the total number of shares each monthly anniversary of the Option Vesting Commencement Date becoming fully vested on the four-year anniversary of the Option Vesting Commencement Date.
